response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but his recent career gap and senior-level title suggest overqualification for an entry-level role, while his German language limitation may hinder on-site collaboration in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from API to UI with real-world scaling examples
Active open-source contributions and deep architectural understanding
concerns: Recent career gap (2025–present) with no clear technical activity
Overqualified for entry-level role; risk of low retention or mismatched expectations
Basic German proficiency may impede on-site collaboration in Berlin
